title: The Let's Groove Collab
description:
Dedicated to Maurice White: 1941 - 2016
 
I CAN'T BELIEVE THIS IS FINALLY FINISHED! This collab has literally been years in the making. The original concept was crafted in late 2014, and parts were assigned in early 2015. Participants have come and gone, but we have finally pulled this collab off! Thank you so much to everyone involved who stuck with me through these years; it definitely has been tough, but you all stepped up to the plate! Unfortunately, Maurice White passed in the early stages of the 2016 revamp, and we all agreed that this should be dedicated to his legacy. He was one hell of a musician, and someone who's music has impacted my life deeply. ENJOY THE COLLAB, FOLKS!
